LanguageData.KT_Communication.label: Integrated Communication Terminal
LanguageData.KT_Communication.description: This terminal integrates multiple functions including shop communication and directing long-range fire support, enabling global delivery without leaving home.\n\nRight-click the structure to activate trade communication
LanguageData.KT_duckmazon_express_AG_TANK.label: Duckmazon Battle-Damaged Express Box (Hover Tank)
LanguageData.KT_duckmazon_express_AG_TANK.description: Hover tank express packaging box. Severely damaged externally due to violent transportation, but the contents should be fine. The interior space is much larger than the exterior suggests, but will become useless after unsealing. Rumor has it this courier company lost a delivery belonging to a Great Being but refused compensation. In anger, they were trapped in this game by the Great Being, doomed to eternal suffering. Requires Mechanic to open
LanguageData.KT_UF_Express_main_autogun.label: UF Express Package (Vanguard Autocannon Type)
LanguageData.KT_UF_Express_main_autogun.description: Express packaging box for the Vanguard-class Combat Walker. The interior space is much larger than the exterior suggests, but will become useless after unsealing.\n\nRequires Mechanic to open
LanguageData.KT_UF_Express_main_gatling_gun.label: UF Express Package (Vanguard Gatling Type)
LanguageData.KT_UF_Express_main_gatling_gun.descripti: Express packaging box for the Vanguard-class Combat Walker. The interior space is much larger than the exterior suggests, but will become useless after unsealing.\n\nRequires Mechanic to open
LanguageData.KT_UF_Express_main_gun.label: UF Express Package (Vanguard Artillery Type)
LanguageData.KT_UF_Express_main_gun.description: Express packaging box for the Vanguard-class Combat Walker. The interior space is much larger than the exterior suggests, but will become useless after unsealing.\n\nRequires Mechanic to open
